name: creature-companion
description: A multi-session creature companion for Codex and Claude Code.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/main/main.js && set VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173&& electron ."
